title: JoSAA 2025 Opening and Closing Ranks

detail.title: JoSAA 2025 Opening and Closing Ranks
detail.short_info: JoSAA 2025 Opening and Closing Ranks are released for all rounds. Check round-wise OR & CR for IITs, NITs, IIITs & GFTIs on the official portal for complete counselling data.

content.text: JoSAA 2025 Opening and Closing Ranks (Round-wise) are now available on the official portal. Candidates can check category-wise OR and CR for IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs to analyze seat allotment trends and predict chances for future counselling.

Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) conducts centralized counselling for admissions to 23 IITs, 31 NITs, IIEST Shibpur, 26 IIITs, and other Government Funded Technical Institutes (GFTIs). JoSAA 2025 counselling concluded with Round 6 seat allotment. Opening and Closing Ranks (OR & CR) help candidates understand the minimum ranks required for various programs across categories (Open, EWS, OBC-NCL, SC, ST, PwD).
JoSAA 2025 ranks for IITs (Round-wise PDFs and data available officially).
JoSAA 2025 ranks for NITs and IIEST follows similar structure. NITs generally have higher closing ranks compared to IITs for popular branches like CSE.

sections.heading: How to Check JoSAA 2025 Opening and Closing Ranks?

items: Visit the official JoSAA website (josaa.nic.in).
Go to the Opening and Closing Ranks section.
Select the round, institute type, institute, academic program, and category.
View or download the detailed ranks.
Number of applicants and seats available
Difficulty level of JEE Main / JEE Advanced
Popularity of branch and institute
Category and gender
Previous year trends

sections.heading: Why is Knowing JoSAA Opening and Closing Ranks Important?

content.text: Knowing JoSAA Opening and Closing Ranks is crucial for candidates participating in the counselling process. These ranks help aspirants understand the minimum and maximum ranks at which seats were allotted in previous rounds for different institutes, branches, and categories.

items: Realistic College and Branch Prediction: Candidates can assess their chances of getting admission into desired IITs, NITs, IIITs, or GFTIs based on their JEE rank.
Informed Choice Filling: Helps in making a smart and strategic preference list during JoSAA counselling to avoid missing out on good seats.
Understanding Competition: Shows the popularity and cut-throat competition for specific programs like Computer Science, Electronics, Mechanical, etc.
Category-wise Analysis: Reserved category students (OBC-NCL, SC, ST, EWS) can check their respective category ranks for better clarity.
Trend Analysis: By comparing previous years’ data, students can predict possible rank ranges for the current or upcoming year.
Decision Making for Withdrawals / Upgradations: Candidates can decide whether to accept a seat or wait for better options in later rounds.
